name: Internal Memo: Template for Next Round of Practice Summaries
description: An internal Aberdeen Group memorandum from analyst Wayne Kernochan to Peter Kastner proposing a revised template for Aberdeen Practice Summary documents. The memo provides a detailed five-chapter master outline with worked examples drawn from NOS (Network Operating System) and NT/Intel server practice areas, and argues for recasting Practice Summaries as sales-oriented hot-topics vehicles. Two template versions are offered: a lightly revised version with prior-year examples and a more substantial revision emphasizing hot topics for 1999.
